magma_gelatin.title: Craft Magma Gelatin (Nether's Delight — the best fire immunity food in the game)

subtitle.text: Magma Gelatin gives sustained fire immunity. Better than Fire Resistance in extended fights.

description: CH.06 · THE INFERNAL KITCHEN
▸ The Infernal civilization ate what was available.
Magma cream. Nether fungi. Blaze powder.
They built a cuisine from ingredients that burn.
The food they made grants fire immunity.
Not protection. Immunity.
◈ MAGMA GELATIN
└ ★ BEST FIRE IMMUNITY FOOD IN THE GAME
└ Grants: Fire Resistance effect (food-based,
not potion — stacks differently)
└ Duration: sustained while the food effect lasts
└ Recipe: magma cream + gelatin base + Nether fungi
(crafted in FD Cooking Pot)
└ Stackable: bring multiple for extended Nether runs
◈ NETHER'S DELIGHT OVERVIEW
└ Full Farmer's Delight addon for Nether biomes
└ Uses native Nether materials: fungi, flesh,
magma cream, blaze powder
└ Magma Gelatin = the crown recipe
└ Other dishes cover protein + grain groups
└ Nether Stew: high saturation, Nether biome sourced
◈ SCROLL: The Infernal Kitchen
└ Found in: Nether fortress cooking areas,
bastion food caches, Nether exploration chests
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full Nether's Delight recipe list,
Magma Gelatin awareness
▸ The scroll was written in a language
that uses fire-resistant ink.
Of course it was.
▶ Find The Infernal Kitchen scroll [check]
▶ Craft Magma Gelatin [check]
◇ Magma Gelatin + Eiswein = the Nether survival kit.
One prevents damage. One undoes it.
Both together make the Nether traversable.
